signals.headline: Core inflation** (excluding volatile food and energy) came in at **2
signals.raw: Core inflation** (excluding volatile food and energy) came in at **2.6% year-over-year**, slightly better than the 3.7% consensus forecast but still elevated enough to likely pause Federal Reserve interest rate cuts.[1][5] Month-over-month, core inflation rose just 0.2%, better than expected.[1]

signals.headline: US Regulators Officially Classify SOL and ETH as Commodities (March 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Regulators Officially Classify SOL and ETH as Commodities (March 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
US regulators classified both Solana (SOL) and Ethereum (ETH) as commodities in March 2026, resolving major legal uncertainty and enabling ETF allocations, with ETH ETFs at $48B AUM vs. SOL's $4.8B.[1]  
ETH saw an 8.6% rise to $2,377 with 41% weekly transaction growth, reclaiming activity leaders

signals.headline: No Other Confirmations Today | NO | N/A**
signals.raw:
No Other Confirmations Today | NO | N/A**  
Ethereum transactions jumped 41% weekly and Solana hit records (167M token holders, 148M daily non-vote txns as of Apr 14), but these reflect ongoing trends without new RIGHT NOW resolutions; Q1 txns show Solana at 25.3B vs. ETH's 200M.[1][2][4]

signals.headline: US-Iran War Drives Inflation to 3
signals.raw: US-Iran War Drives Inflation to 3.3% in March, Highest in Nearly 2 Years | YES | HIGH Confidence**

signals.headline: Headline inflation** surged to **3
signals.raw: Headline inflation** surged to **3.3% year-over-year in March 2026**, the largest annual increase in nearly two years, driven primarily by a 10.9% spike in energy prices following the start of the US-Israel war with Iran.[1][3] Oil prices jumped 45% in a single month, rising from an average of $71 per barrel in February to $103 per barrel in March.[3]
matched_markets: Will annual inflation increase by 3.8% in April?

signals.headline: Market implications:** This data substantially changes 2026 inflation trajectories
signals.raw: Market implications:** This data substantially changes 2026 inflation trajectories. signals.headline: Solana Validators Confirm Alpenglow Upgrade Approval, Slashing Finality to <200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Validators Confirm Alpenglow Upgrade Approval, Slashing Finality to <200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana validators approved the Alpenglow consensus upgrade last week, redesigning the chain's layer to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to under 200 milliseconds for most transactions, positioning Solana for high-frequency trading and real-time payments that Ethereum's L1 cannot
